Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` after the change.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/lib/external-drop-utils.ts"],"commands_run":["npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false"]},{"task_id":"T2","status":"done","executor_notes":"Added `uploadVideoGeneration` using `extractVideoPosterFrame`, `uploadBlobToStorage`, and `extractVideoMetadata`, with thumbnail/metadata fallbacks that do not block upload. The wiring is in place. I’m compiling and running the full `useExternalDrop` test module now so the batch closes with an actual routing check, not just a type-only change.
